message:
test(json_mode_parity): migrate AgentEvent to Arc<str> session_id and unbox AssistantMessageEvent

Update ~80+ test cases in json_mode_parity suite to reflect AgentEvent struct changes:
- session_id field now uses Arc::from("session-abc") instead of String::from() with
  Arc wrapping, matching the upstream change to Arc<str> for cheaper cloning
- Remove Box::new() wrapper from AssistantMessageEvent variants in MessageUpdate,
  reflecting the struct field change from Box<AssistantMessageEvent> to inline

All test coverage across lifecycle events (agent start/end, turn start/end),
message update events (text delta, thinking, tool calls, done, error), and
extension event forwarding is preserved.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
